title: payment_watcher: no comment on why fallback_days uses unwrap_or not subscription_days
description: relay/src/payment_watcher.rs:375-377: fallback_days = invoice.subscription_days.unwrap_or(state.inner.subscription_days). The comment says 'pre-migration invoices that lack it' but does not explain what version introduced subscription_days to InvoiceRow. A contributor 12 months from now will not know whether subscription_days can still be None in new invoices. Add a comment: subscription_days is always set for invoices created after version X (the DB migration that added it); None only occurs for pre-migration rows.
